  1| # Sessions and Checkpoints

  3| ## Overview
  4| 
  5| Entire CLI creates checkpoints for AI coding sessions. The system is agent-agnostic - it works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Cursor, Factory AI Droid, Copilot CLI, or any tool that triggers Entire hooks.
